exercises.title: Basic Shadowing - Greetings
exercises.instruction: Listen to the audio and speak along with it at the same time. Try to match the rhythm and timing.
exercises.targetText: Good morning, everyone. How are you doing today?
tips: Start speaking as soon as you hear the model audio
Match the pauses and stress patterns exactly
Don't wait for the speaker to finish - speak along with them

exercises.title: Shadowing - Meeting Start
exercises.instruction: Practice shadowing this meeting opening. Focus on natural rhythm.
tips: Keep 'Let's' and 'with' unstressed - say them quickly

exercises.title: Shadowing - Action Items
exercises.instruction: Shadow this sentence about action items. Match the energy and pacing.
exercises.targetText: I'll follow up on the details and send you the report.

exercises.title: Compound Words
exercises.instruction: Practice stress in compound words. The first part usually gets the stress.
exercises.targetText: We need to set up a meeting.
tips: Compound words like 'set-up' stress the first syllable
Keep function words like 'to' and 'a' unstressed

exercises.title: Consonant to Vowel Linking
exercises.instruction: Connect the consonant at the end of one word to the vowel at the start of the next.
tips: Link 'take' + 'a' - the k connects smoothly to the vowel
Think of it as one continuous sound stream
